text: Wandering through this space, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and introspection. The sharp geometry and soft light set my mind adrift between present awareness and abstract meaning. Encountering the exhibit, I sense the thoughtful energy of human invention and possibility; it’s an invitation to ponder the relationships between ourselves, our machines, and the spaces we inhabit. I feel both out of place and deeply at home, wondering about connection and the ways we seek to understand our environments and each other.
